title: Richie Rich Dual-Tone Rice Chain Bracelet – Pyrite & Black Obsidian
short_description: A bold dual-tone rice chain bracelet pairing two natural Pyrite beads for prosperity with two polished Black Obsidian beads for protection — set on alternating gold- and silver-tone geometric links with an adjustable fit.
body_html:
Move forward with ambition while staying grounded. The Richie Rich Dual-Tone Rice Chain Bracelet balances a four-bead centre of two glossy Black Obsidian beads on the outer sides and two metallic Pyrite beads at the core, creating a clean, symmetrical dual-crystal design with real meaning.

The crystals sit on alternating gold- and silver-tone geometric rice links, giving the bracelet a modern, premium look that styles effortlessly with gold jewellery, silver accessories, watches and everyday outfits. Lightweight and comfortable, it works worn alone as a statement piece or stacked in your wrist party.

The Richie Rich philosophy: Pyrite for prosperity, confidence and forward movement, paired with Black Obsidian for grounding and protection from negativity and distractions — the balance between chasing success and protecting your energy along the way.

  • Two natural Pyrite beads and two polished Black Obsidian beads in a balanced four-bead centre
  • Dual-tone finish — alternating gold- and silver-tone geometric rice links
  • Adjustable extension chain for a flexible wrist fit
  • Secure lobster clasp closure
  • Lightweight, comfortable and unisex — made for men and women

Pyrite is traditionally associated with wealth and prosperity, encouraging confidence, ambition and a success-oriented mindset. Black Obsidian is traditionally linked to protection, grounding and emotional stability, helping shield the wearer from negativity and reduce distractions.

Care: Keep the bracelet away from water, perfume, sweat, creams and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft, dry cloth after use and store separately in a clean pouch or box. Natural crystals may show slight variations in colour, texture and shine, making every piece unique.

Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and are not guaranteed financial or medical outcomes. Country of Origin: India.
seo_title: Pyrite & Black Obsidian Dual-Tone Bracelet | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Richie Rich dual-tone rice chain bracelet with natural Pyrite for prosperity & Black Obsidian for protection. Gold-silver links, adjustable, unisex.

metafields.highlights: Two natural Pyrite beads for prosperity + two polished Black Obsidian beads for protection · Balanced four-bead centre (Obsidian–Pyrite–Pyrite–Obsidian) · Alternating gold- and silver-tone geometric rice links · Adjustable extension chain with secure lobster clasp · Lightweight, comfortable and unisex.
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Natural Pyrite beads, natural Black Obsidian beads, gold-tone and silver-tone metal geometric rice links, gold-tone adjustable extension chain and lobster clasp. Round, polished beads. Country of Origin: India.
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume, sweat, creams and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft, dry cloth after use and store separately in a clean jewellery pouch or box. Natural crystals may vary slightly in colour, texture and shine.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Are the Pyrite and Black Obsidian beads natural?
faqs.a: Yes. The bracelet uses two natural Pyrite beads and two polished natural Black Obsidian beads. As they are natural stones, slight variations in colour, texture and shine are normal and make each piece unique.

faqs.q: Is this bracelet for men or women?
faqs.a: Both. The dual-tone design is unisex and lightweight, so it suits men and women and pairs easily with watches, gold or silver accessories and everyday outfits.
Yes. An adjustable extension chain gives a flexible fit for most wrists, and the lobster clasp keeps it securely fastened.

faqs.q: What is the meaning behind the two crystals?
faqs.a: Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, confidence and ambition, while Black Obsidian is linked to grounding and protection from negativity — together representing the balance of chasing success while protecting your energy.

faqs.q: How do I care for the bracelet?
faqs.a: Keep it away from water, perfume, sweat, creams and harsh chemicals, wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after use, and store it separately in a pouch or box to protect the finish.
